title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Bharat Petroleum Global Group

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Bharat Petroleum Global Group
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Bharat Petroleum Global Group in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bharat Petroleum Global Group:
Bharat Petroleum Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Petroleum Global Group!
